summary: Planned one conservative action per listed PR. The hydrated artifact contains live state for 20 of 25 listed PRs. Fifteen hydrated PRs remain independent maintainer-review candidates in this inventory shard, five validator-flagged security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, and five listed candidates are absent from the compacted preflight item matrix so those exact PR decisions need refreshed hydration before classification.
